message:
Remove redundant "upcoming" label from unreleased entries

The "Unreleased" title already indicates the content is upcoming, so
the additional "upcoming" date/meta was duplicative. This change:
- Sets date to empty string for unreleased entries (instead of "upcoming")
- Removes the meta="upcoming" attribute from unreleased component

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
